description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet with a modern design, featuring a white frame and three vertically stacked drawers with a rich, woodgrain finish. The drawers are accented by sleek, horizontal metallic handles, providing a contemporary touch. The woodgrain pattern is prominent on the front, sides, and top surfaces, giving the cabinet a warm and natural appearance. One of the drawers is partially open, revealing a spacious interior suitable for storing documents, tools, or other items. The cabinet stands on a flat base, ensuring stability on urban surfaces such as sidewalks, garages, or office spaces. The overall construction suggests a combination of engineered wood and metal, making it both sturdy and visually appealing.
description: A tall, modern cabinet with a white frame, three woodgrain drawers, and metallic handles, one drawer partially open. The design is sleek and suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing three woodgrain drawers with metallic handles, the middle drawer is partially open.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the woodgrain side panel and the depth of the partially open drawer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous woodgrain panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the woodgrain panel and the open drawer from a different angle.
